Describe what is happening
canonical_answer: A black pot is filled with a clear liquid that is actively boiling with many bubbles while a thin metal rod is partially submerged within it. A stainless steel pot contains a yellowish, cloudy liquid that shows gentle movement or simmering nearby. White tiles are visible in the background of the stainless steel pot shot.

question: Describe the sequence of distinct objects and scenes shown in the video.
canonical_answer: At 2s, two flat wooden owl cutouts appear on floral fabric, one natural and one gold; at 6s, a painted wooden owl figurine on a red base is shown with blue eyes; at 14s, an outdoor landscape with pink flowers and snow-capped mountains appears.

question: Detail the visual content present at each major transition point in the video.
canonical_answer: At 2s, wooden owl cutouts rest on white fabric with purple flowers; at 6s, carved owl figurines sit on a curved red base against a white wall; at 14s, pink bell-shaped flowers hang in front of green trees and large snow-capped mountain peaks.
